value.name: ={{ $('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.email.split('@')[0] }}
value.notes: ={{ 'Time Waster: ' + ($('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.time_waster || 'N/A') + '\nCurrent Tools: ' + (Array.isArray($('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.current_tools) ? $('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.current_tools.join(', ') : ($('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.current_tools || 'N/A')) }}

parameters.subject: =Your {{ $('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.industry }} Automation Package Recommendation
parameters.bodyContent:
={{ 'Hi there!

Thank you for taking our Industry Automation Quiz!

Based on your responses, we've identified the perfect automation solutions for your ' + ($('Parse Typeform Data').item.json.leadData.industry || 'business') + ' business.

**Your Recommended Package:**

' + (($('Lookup Industry Solutions').item.json.fields && $('Lookup Industry Solutions').item.json.fields['Package Name']) || 'Industry-Specific Automation Package') + '

**What's Included:**
' + (($('Lookup Industry Solutions').item.json.fields && $('Lookup Industry Solutions').item.json.fields['Solutions']) || '5 industry-specific automation solutions') + '

**Get Your Package:**
👉 https://rensto.com/solutions

Questions? Reply to this email or book a call with our team.

Best regards,
The Rensto Team' }}
